rationale: Review 2 catches both the over-constrained `IsUnipotent` context and the more fundamental over-constraint on `AffineAlgGroup` itself (requiring `[Field k]` when `Algebra.FiniteType` and `Algebra.IsGeometricallyReduced` make sense over any `CommRing k`), a generality issue Review 1 misses entirely; acting on Review 2 yields a strictly more reusable foundational typeclass.
